query:
-- Ration plan for category 7 (Fattening)
SELECT rp.id, rp.effectiveDate, rp.endDate, rp.isActive,
  rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay, rp.feedItemId, fi.name AS feedItem
FROM ration_plans rp
JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId
WHERE rp.categoryId = 7 AND rp.isActive = 1;
command:

  rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay, rp.feedItemId, fi.name AS feedItem

JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId
WHERE rp.categoryId = 7 AND rp.isActive = 1;
